findings.evidence: `RootsOfUnity.lean:111` defines `pointsMulEquiv`, `RootsOfUnity.lean:129` has `pointsMulEquiv_mapValue`, and `RootsOfUnity.lean:140`/`:152` already contain the inverse generator normal forms; the new file adds only further lemmas about those same declarations at `RootsOfUnityPointNormalForms.lean:68` and `:119`.
findings.fix: Move `generator_pow_val`, the `pointsMulEquiv_symm_apply_single_*` normal forms, and `mapValue_pointsMulEquiv_symm_apply*` into `TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/RootsOfUnity.lean` near the existing `pointsMulEquiv_apply`, `pointsMulEquiv_mapValue`, and generator inverse lemmas.
findings.issue: This file splits core `RootsOfUnityGroup.pointsMulEquiv` API away from its canonical home; the new declarations compute the same inverse equivalence already defined and documented in `RootsOfUnity.lean`.

summary: The new lemmas are in the wrong home: they are direct API extensions of `RootsOfUnityGroup.pointsMulEquiv` and should live with the existing roots-of-unity points calculation rather than in a separate normal-forms file.
